name: fleetmool-landing
description: Marketing site for Fleetmool and F4W — pure static, deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html f4w.html styles.css script.js dist/
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=416f74acd9056965776eb0103b3b1ee7 wrangler pages deploy
